description: Phase 2: Multi-Account Email Management, Account Rotation, Custom Tracking Domains, and Sending Reputation Dashboard. CRUD for multiple sender accounts with SMTP/SendGrid config, round-robin and weighted rotation, daily limit enforcement, custom tracking domain with DNS verification, and per-account reputation scoring.
steps: 1. Add Prisma models to schema.prisma: EmailAccount (id, email, name, smtpHost, smtpPort, smtpUser, smtpPass, sendgridApiKey, dailyLimit, sentToday, warmupStatus, isActive, reputationScore, bounceRate, lastResetAt, createdAt, updatedAt), TrackingDomain (id, domain, cnameTarget, cnameVerified, verifiedAt, isDefault, createdAt, updatedAt), AccountRotationConfig (id, strategy: round_robin/weighted/failover, weights Json?, skipOnDailyLimit, skipOnHighBounce, bounceThreshold, createdAt, updatedAt).
3. Add shared types: EMAIL_ACCOUNT_STATUS, ROTATION_STRATEGY, TRACKING_DOMAIN_STATUS in packages/shared/src/types/index.ts.
4. Add schemas: emailAccountSchema, trackingDomainSchema, accountRotationConfigSchema in packages/shared/src/schemas/index.ts.

5. Create apps/api/src/services/email-accounts.ts: createAccount, updateAccount, deleteAccount, testConnection (send test email via account SMTP), getAccountHealth, resetDailyCounts (called by daily cron), selectNextAccount(strategy) - implements round-robin, weighted, and failover rotation logic.
6. Create apps/api/src/services/tracking-domains.ts: addDomain, verifyDomain (check CNAME DNS records), removeDomain, getActiveDomain.
7. Create apps/api/src/services/reputation.ts: calculateReputationScore(accountId), getReputationDashboard(), checkReputationAlerts() - returns warnings when score drops below threshold.
8. Create apps/api/src/routes/email-accounts.ts: full CRUD + POST /:id/test-connection, GET /:id/health, POST /rotate (get next account for sending).
9. Create apps/api/src/routes/tracking-domains.ts: GET, POST, DELETE /:id, POST /:id/verify.
11. Register all new routes in apps/api/src/index.ts.
12. Update mockDb.ts with emailAccount, trackingDomain, accountRotationConfig models.
13. Add factory functions: buildEmailAccount, buildTrackingDomain, buildAccountRotationConfig.
14. Create service tests: email-accounts.test.ts, tracking-domains.test.ts, reputation.test.ts.
15. Create route tests: email-accounts.test.ts, tracking-domains.test.ts, reputation.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Multiple email accounts can be created with SMTP or SendGrid config
Round-robin rotation selects accounts in order, skipping those at daily limit
Weighted rotation favors accounts with better reputation
Custom tracking domains can be added and verified via DNS CNAME lookup
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api to confirm no TypeScript errors
